release_notes: v1.1.0 Multi-model role configuration and discussion mode
Model Roles: Default, Thinking, Coding, Planning, Fast, Fallback
Discussion Mode: multi-model collaboration with configurable rounds
Settings UI: new Model Roles section with role status and discussion controls
Chat UI: Discussion Mode toggle, rounds selector, transcript viewer
CLI: models roles, role-set, role-test, role-reset, discussion-status
Safety: secret redaction, cost warnings, max rounds cap
